description: The DWL-T2 dispatch told lead to run 'bun run typecheck 2>&1 | grep -c src/' as the gate (expected 0). On this repo that gate returns 52 because @silvery dependencies under node_modules expose paths like 'node_modules/@silvery/ink/src/...' that match the unanchored 'src/' pattern. A naive lead would conclude the gate failed when project src/ has 0 errors.
resolution: Use anchored gate: 'bun run typecheck 2>&1 | grep -E ^src/' or equivalently filter out node_modules first: 'bun run typecheck 2>&1 | grep -v node_modules | grep -E src/'. Update future dispatch templates to use anchored regex when grepping typecheck output.
